title: Saul Protects Robin
description: Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.
scene: Across pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this part follows Jaguar D. Saul, Nico Robin, Spandam, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover. Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: How dare you! Hurting my Nakama....!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Do ya really want Da weapons?

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: That will lead 10 warships, Jaguar D. Saul.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: Simply wanted to understand Da History!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: He knows everything about this mission.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Capture them!! Capture Jaguar D. Saul and Olivia

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You have PermisSoon to shoot them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: S'okay... I can't stay in DA Marines

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Wit' dis doubt inside my chest.

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: Jaguar D. Saul!! Go back, please!!!

summary: Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.
